title: Event
description: Formal schema for an event per D10 (event kind) + D23 (work-unit-id slot addition). Events form the workspace's single ordered chain of attribution-bearing happenings (D10). This schema validates the event envelope and discriminates payload structure by payload-subtype: core subtypes' payloads are validated against per-subtype schemas (claim / action / state-change / composition-change / lifecycle-transition), produced in the Phase A refinement pass per D34 finding 5.2; extension-registered payloads are validated by the declaring extension per D29. Notation: JSON Schema Draft 2020-12 per D28. Layer-3 formal schema per D11. Cross-kind referential integrity (actor-id resolution, work-unit-id resolution) is out of scope per D28; runtime + manifest resolution per D30 §4 (clarified by D34 §6.2).

id.description: Unique within the workspace (D10). Instance-identifier per D34.

prev-event.description: Reference to the prior event in the workspace's chain (D10). null only for the workspace's first event ever.

timestamp.description: When the event happened (D10). ISO-8601 UTC.

actors.description: At least one actor reference per D10 + D9. Role-tag vocabulary is shape policy.

role.description: Optional shape-declared role-tag (e.g., drafter, attester, reviewer).

payload-subtype.description: Either a core payload-subtype (D10) or a fully-qualified extension-registered subtype per D29.

payload.description: Subtype-specific structure. Core subtypes' payloads validated by `allOf` discrimination below; extension-declared subtypes validated by declaring extension per D29.

work-unit-id.description: Optional reference to the work-unit (D20) the event is associated with (D23). null when the event is not work-unit-associated (e.g., workspace-level lifecycle events).
